{{Quote|When you reach your destination, you'll find an Imperial research facility, from which a team of Rebel commandos are attempting to liberate a squad of AT-PTs. Their escape has become compromised, and we need your help to get them out of there. The speeders and tow cables will help you with any walkers you may find. Good Luck.|General Carlist Rieekan's briefing|<ref name="RS" />}}
The '''Escape from Fest''', also known as the '''raid on Fest''', was a ground battle between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that took place during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The battle was initially an [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] mission to steal three [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|All Terrain Personal Transports]] from the Imperial research lab on [[Fest/Legends|Fest]]. When their cover was blown and the squad was trapped, [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] intervened and extracted them safely.

==Prelude==
While the [[Battle above Taloraan|Taloraan operation]] was taking place, a team of Rebel commandos attacked an Imperial [[Weapons Research Facility]] on [[Fest/Legends|Fest]] and liberated a squad of AT-PT walkers. The AT-PTs attempted to make their escape, with Imperial troops and armor in pursuit. However, they soon found themselves trapped as the main gate of the complex was raised, cutting them off from their escape route.<ref name="RS" />

==The battle==
[[File:Escape_from_Fest_2.jpg|thumb|left|220px|An AT-AT destroyed by Rogue Squadron.]]
[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] deployed to Fest to aid in the escape immediately after completing their mission at Taloraan. The Rogues split up to simultaneously bring down the main gate, as well as to cover the commandos' retreat. When the AT-PTs were liberated, the squadron aided them in blasting their way through the Imperial defenses. In a fierce battle against Imperial [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] and [[XR-85 tank droid]]s, the Rogues and the commandos successfully punched their way through to the landing zone.<ref name="RS" />

In a final attempt to stop the AT-PTs, the Imperials sent in a wave of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] to carpet-bomb the walkers. The Rogues managed to repulse this final attack as well, allowing the commandos to reach the safety of the Rebel's [[Y-4 Transport|Y-4 ''Raptor''-class transport]].<ref name="RS" />

When the commandos were away, the squadron turned back to finish off the Fest research facility. After attacking the [[DSS-02 shield generator/Legends|DSS-02]] [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]] situated in an outlying outpost and bringing down the protective shield, the Rogues razed the building with concentrated fire.<ref name="RS" />

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)}}
During the bombardment, Rogue Squadron did a detour to retrieve seeker proton torpedoes in close proximity to the research facility proper.
{{Endgame}}

==Aftermath==
[[File:Escape_from_Fest_3.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Rebel commandos running to the Y-4 Transport.]]
[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kohl Seerdon]] was infuriated by the incident, and in retaliation blockaded [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]],<ref name="RS" /> [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma's]] home planet.

==Behind the scenes==
The Escape from Fest appears in a level of the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']], the player is required to use the harpoon and tow cable of a [[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeder]] against an AT-AT in order to complete the mission successfully. As the Battle of Fest takes place in the timeline prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], during which [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] supposedly devised the strategy for downing the four-legged walkers, this element of the mission ''may'' be non-canon and chalked up to game mechanics.
